74 = Texas (eff. 10/2005) 
80 = Maryland (eff. 8/2000) 
97 = Northern Marianas 
98 = Guam 
99 = With 000 county code is American 
Samoa; otherwise unknown

COMMENT: The state code is based on the latest state code for the beneficiary for the year in the CME data. If the 
value is missing, then the first state code in the following year populates this field.
